evals.prompt: We have added a new GET /api/v1/metrics endpoint to server.ts. Please sync this with the Postman collections under our aria-vega-mm workspace. Set its order to 5000 and use variables where applicable.
evals.expected_output: Creates a new Metrics.request.yaml file with order 5000, baseUrl variable, and empty body type.

evals.prompt: The parameters for the POST /assignments route in server.ts have been modified; we now also accept an optional 'allocatedAmount' number in the JSON body. Please update the relevant Postman request files to reflect this change.
evals.expected_output: Updates the body content inside Create Assignment.request.yaml to include 'allocatedAmount' with an example value.
